title: Nature's Spirit
description: A minecraft mod which enhances world generation with new biomes, blocks, and items
body:
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/720351099789246546/1145944652122443877/image.png)

📖**About**: Nature's Spirit is a mod that aims to expand upon Minecraft's environments by adding new diverse biomes such as Blooming Deserts and Coconut Beaches. Check out the gallery to see a wide scope of features with more in game!!

🛠️ **Requirements**:!
Fabric API
Terrablender
Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.20.6, or 1.21
